LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-19-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JAMES JOHNSON NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATED SETTLEMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATED SETTLEMENT (CCP 664.6)" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
PROOF OF ELECTRONIC SERVICE OF EX PARTE APPLICATION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE; AND DECLARTION (TRANSACTION ID # 73097499) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, JAMES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES, NORMAN A. $910,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, $1,500.00 (CONTRACTUAL FEES), TOTAL JUDGMENT $911,560.00, (SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT")

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. REBECCA COLL, Esq. of Quadra & Coll, LLP (tel: 415-426-3502) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JAMES JOHNSON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulated Settlement.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entry of judgment pursuant to stipulated settlement (CCP 664.6)" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
